heading: Retired lists
label: 12774 Retired lists
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 1376(a) and 6017 of this title, prior to repeal by , (3)(A)(i).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(k)(2)
Amendments2006—Subsec. (b). substituted “the Navy Reserve” for “the Naval Reserve”.Pub. L. 109–163
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
amendments: Amendments2006—Subsec. (b). substituted “the Navy Reserve” for “the Naval Reserve”.Pub. L. 109–163

children.label: a
children.text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned, there shall be maintained retired lists containing the names of the Reserves of the armed forces under the Secretary’s jurisdiction who are in the Retired Reserve.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy shall maintain a United States Naval Reserve Retired List containing the names of members of the Navy Reserve and the Marine Corps Reserve entitled to retired pay.
